name: dispatch-tasks
description: Dispatch a batch of tasks to worker servers and collect results

tasks.content: [CMUX] Verify all target workers are healthy
tasks.detail:
For each worker URL:
  run_command("curl -s http://localhost:<PORT>/health")
- [ ] List workers with port, health status
- [ ] Flag any unavailable workers
Gate: All target workers confirmed healthy.

Break the overall goal into independent sub-tasks:
- [ ] Each sub-task has a clear Final Answer expectation
- [ ] Tasks are formatted for worker_call
- [ ] Dependencies between tasks are documented (if any)
Gate: Task plan ready for dispatch.

For each task, dispatch to the appropriate worker:
  worker_call(worker="http://localhost:<PORT>", task="...", timeout=120)
- [ ] Tasks dispatched in parallel where possible
- [ ] run_id recorded for each dispatch
- [ ] Long tasks use sync=false with polling
Gate: All tasks dispatched.

For each dispatched task:
- [ ] If sync=true: result already returned
- [ ] If sync=false: poll worker_status until done, then worker_result
- [ ] Collect all results
- [ ] Check for errors or timeouts
Gate: All results collected.

Summarize all worker results:
- [ ] Total tasks dispatched
- [ ] Completed successfully: N
- [ ] Failed: N (with error details)
- [ ] Files modified across all workers
- [ ] Any follow-up actions needed
Gate: Complete summary delivered.
